title: BWC and Incident Records: King Soopers Shooting / Ahmad Al Aliwi Al-Issa (March 22, 2021)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Colorado Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) and dashcam footage, as well as the initial incident report, regarding the mass shooting incident at the King Soopers grocery store involving suspect Ahmad Al Aliwi Al-Issa.

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: March 22, 2021

Location: King Soopers, 3600 Table Mesa Drive, Boulder, CO

Suspect Name: Ahmad Al Aliwi Al-Issa

Incident Summary: Mass shooting event resulting in the deaths of 10 people, including Boulder Police Officer Eric Talley. The suspect was apprehended after an officer-involved shooting inside the store.

Records requested:

All BWC footage from the initial responding officers who entered the building and engaged the suspect.

BWC footage capturing the apprehension and detention of the suspect.

The full Narrative/Incident Report (Redacted as per Colorado Revised Statutes).

Any available 911 emergency call recordings and dispatch/CAD logs related to the active shooter report.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic

title: BWC and Incident Records: David DePape / Paul Pelosi (Oct 28, 2022)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) and dashcam footage, as well as the initial incident report, regarding the home invasion and assault involving Paul Pelosi and the suspect David DePape.

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: October 28, 2022

Location: Residence in Pacific Heights, San Francisco, CA

Suspect Name: David DePape

Victim Name: Paul Pelosi

SFPD Case Number: 220755561 (or related)

Records requested:

All BWC footage from the initial responding officers (specifically Officers Kolby Scott and Kyle Cagney) during the arrival, entry, and confrontation.

All dashcam (in-car camera) footage from patrol units at the scene.

The full Narrative/Incident Report (Redacted as per California Statutes).

Any available 911 emergency call recordings and dispatch/CAD logs related to this incident.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic

title: Susan Lorincz Arrest Report and Body Camera Footage

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.I am requesting all available body-worn camera (BWC) and dashcam footage, as well as the initial incident report, regarding the arrest and investigation of Susan Lorincz (Case Related to the shooting of Ajike "AJ" Owens).

Specific details to assist your search:

Incident Date: June 2, 2023

Location: Quail Run community, Ocala, Marion County, FL

Suspect Name: Susan Lorincz

Victim Name: Ajike "AJ" Owens

Records requested: 
1. All BWC footage from the initial response on June 2, 2023.
2. BWC footage of the suspect's interview and subsequent arrest/detention.
3. The full Narrative/Incident Report (Redacted as per Florida Statutes).
4. Any available 911 call audio related to this incident.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic
